title: Teladoc Health Expands AI Capabilities for Virtual Care with Advanced Virtual Sitter Solution
text: Teladoc Health Expands AI Capabilities for Hospitals and Health Systems with Advanced Virtual Sitter Solution. AI Integration: Teladoc has been developing AI capabilities over 10+ years, integrated into suite of virtual care solutions. New AI-enabled capabilities enhance Virtual Sitter solution to improve patient safety and address workforce challenges. Current AI Applications: Advanced pre-trained algorithms with motion detection and pose estimation visually detect patient movement that could lead to falls, enabling faster staff intervention. Single remote staff member can now monitor 25% more patients using AI, increasing inpatient team capacity. Virtual Care Evolution: AI helping organizations optimize clinical resources, speed documentation, enhance safety, improve outcomes and patient/clinician experience. 64% of U.S. patients supportive of healthcare providers using AI in 2024. Future Direction: AI to be used for triage, intake (virtual AI medical assistant), and trustworthy AI systems providing safe, transparent, ethically compliant care enhancing clinician decision-making and patient relationships.
